titleStmt.title: SII 24.475: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 475. (A.R. No. 93 of 1937-38.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of the village Maṭṭēri in Kuḻuttaṇḍalai-śirmai, by Kṛishṇamman, wife of Aparachintala Periya-Timmarāja, son of Rāmarāja Timmarāja of Āravīḍu, for offerings to the god and for feeding Śrīvaishṇavas in the Kandāḍai Aṇṇan Rāmānujakūṭam. The details of the date viz, Śaka 1475, Pramādīcha, Mithuna, ba. 15, Saturday, Mṛigaśīrsha correspond to 1553 A.D., June 10, Saturday, f.d.t. ·06, ·61.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirājan rājapara meśvaran śrīvīrapradāpa śrīvīrasadāśiva
(dāśiva) rāyamahārāyar pṛthuvirājyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 7 10 5 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa paritāpi sam
(tāpisam) vassarattukku mel cellum pramādhica samvatrattu mituṉa nāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu Amāvāsyaiyum śanivāramum peṟṟa mṛgaśirṣanakṣa
(ṣanakṣa)trattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu viḷāvaṟāviti vaḷa nāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatip perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇ
(varśrīpaṇ)ṭārattukku Uttaradeśam Ātraiyagotrattu Āpastambasūtrattu yejuśākhādhyāyiyāna Āṟai viṭu rāmarāju timmarājāvin
(rājāvin) putran Aparacintala periya timmarājāvin deviyār kiṣṇammaneṉ śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Eṉṉuṭaiya Ubhai
yaupaiyam Āka Amutu ceytaruḷum Avasarak kaṭṭaḷai taḷikai muṉṟukku tiruviṭai Āṭṭamāka cetta kuḻuttaṇṭalaic cirmaikku maṭṭeri
maṭṭeri kiṟāmam 1kku nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nañcey puñcey Uḷḷa nilattil prākkupaṭi varukiṟa dāṉamāṉiyam nikki niṉṟa nañcey puñcey puñ
ceypuñ cey cetta(p) paṭukai tiṭar Uḷpaṭa rekaippaṭi poṉ 100 9 U 5kku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikai 10 3 1u 3 Āka varuṣam kku
[rṣakakku] māsam 10 2kku nāḷ 3 100 6 10 5kkum poṉ100 6 U 5 Inta kiṟāmam Oṉṟil Utaiyam poṉ ṉūṟṟu Oṉpatum paṇam Añcum ko
ṇṭa Inta muṉṟu taḷikaiyum nāḷ toṟum Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭikku cantrādityavaraiy naṭakka kaṭavatākavum Inta muṉṟu taḷi
kaikku viṭṭavan viḻukkāṭu nālil Oṉṟu Aṟunāḻi prasātamum kantāṭai Aṇṇan rāmānujakūṭam Āka koṉamman naṭattivarukiṟa
rāmānujakūṭattukku śrīvaiyiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭikkunāḷ Oṉṟukku peṟṟuvarak kaṭavatākavum Ituvum cinta
maṇiyil nāṉ koṇṭuṭaiyatāṉa �toppumaṇṭapattil tiruppati kantāṭai Ayyaṅkār Ubhaiyam Āka paṅkuṉi
māstaiyil naṭantu varukiṟa tirunāḷil Ārun tirunāḷaikku Eṟiaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭikku tiruviṭaiāṭṭamāka ko
ṇṭu cetta tiruvārur Uḷcāvaṭi coḻa maṇṭalam kāveri Āṟṟukku teṟku ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭu kiḻkūṟu perumu
ṉai Aṉutāram Āṉa koppāyipurattu nāṉāgotrattu nāṉāsutrattu maṇiyar Aṇṇan Appaṉ caṭṭaip perumāḷ viṭṭa Aśeṣa
mahājanaṅkaḷ kaiyil muṉṉāḷ śrīpaṇṭārattil koṇṭuṭaiyatāṉa poṉ 100 2 10 5 kku nilam 5liyil muṉ ṉammuṭaiya peril poli
yūṭṭu Āka mutaliṭṭa poṉ 100kku 500kkum vakaippaṭi poṉ 10 2- m maṇṭapam tirukkuttu maṇi viḷakkukku ney ḷa tiruvantikkāppukku ney Uri
Āka ney poṉ Urikku U 1amutu ceytaruḷum poriamutu 3 100kku poṉ 1u 2 Atirasam 2 100 kku poṉ 1u 4 cukiyan2 100- kku poṉ1 veccamutu kūṉ3 10kku
poṉ1 cemattaḷikai 2 U 6 campātaḷikai 2 10 5kku poṉ 2u 5 cantaṉam palam 3 10kku U 4 pākku veṟṟilai U 3 toppukkāṟaṉu kku parivaṭṭavilai
� 2 koṭikkuṭaip piṭikka kūlikkum tirumpi Eḻuntaruḷukaiyil piṭitta pantattukku neyi vilai Uṭpaṭa poṉ 3u 3 Āka poṉ 10 2 Iṭṭa nilam m nālveli
yil Utaiyam poṉ panniraṇṭum koṇṭa Intat toppukkaṭṭaḷai tirunāḷ cantrādityavaraiyum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi viṭṭavan viḻukkā
ṭu nāl Oṉṟum kan=tāṭai Aṇṇan tirumāḷikai titta varaiyum san=tānaparamparai Āka peṟṟu varakkaṭavarākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.475 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
